action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && cat test/rtlib/include/sysy/sylib.h && echo "---" && find test/cases -name "*.sysu.c" -exec cat {} + | grep -oE '[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*' | sort -u | head -60 && echo "---OPS---" && find test/cases -name "*.sysu.c" -exec cat {} + | tr -d '[:alnum:]_[:space:]\"\\\.,;\(\)\{\}\[\]' | grep -oE '.' | sort -u

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && cat test/rtlib/include/sysy/sylib.h && echo \"---\" && find test/cases -name \"*.sysu.c\" -exec cat {} + | grep -oE '[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*' | sort -u | head -60 && echo \"---OPS---\" && find test/cases -name \"*.sysu.c\" -exec cat {} + | tr -d '[:alnum:]_[:space:]\\\"\\\\\\.,;\\(\\)\\{\\}\\[\\]' | grep -oE '.' | sort -u", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "View sylib.h and identify token kinds"}

summary: View sylib.h and identify token kinds
